headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About Simon Property (SPG) Q1 Earnings
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Simon Property (SPG), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
